title: neottia aestivalis
intro: Neottia aestivalis, also known as the yellow-fringed orchid or green adder's mouth, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neottia aestivalis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Neottia aestivalis typically involve the roots, which are dried and used in teas or infusions to reap its medicinal benefits.
